subject: [SDC] Deprecate DCAE-DS
commit_message:
[SDC] Deprecate DCAE-DS

DCAE-DS is now deprecated (replaced by DCAE-MOD) - no need to maintain old charts

Issue-ID: SDC-2642
Signed-off-by: ChrisC <christophe.closset@intl.att.com>
Change-Id: Iba2f17ff22c73b668466abd638323e5b2914c959

entries.message: Uploaded patch set 1.

thanks for spotting this, @Vijay I can disable the check for sdc-dcae-be in the init container of service-change-handler but not sure if something else needs to change in dcae ?

Patch Set 1:

> Patch Set 1:
> 
> thanks for spotting this, @Vijay I can disable the check for sdc-dcae-be in the init container of service-change-handler but not sure if something else needs to change in dcae ?

Thanks Sylvain for looping in.

Christophe - Yes, we should probably change it to "sdc-be". This is required for sdc-distribution-client used inside of ServiceChangehandler (https://git.onap.org/oom/tree/kubernetes/dcaegen2/components/dcae-servicechange-handler/resources/config/config.json)
